title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, PDF, RAG, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli (mattw/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive TUI wrapper around Ollama with conversation history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot (sammcj/ollama-copilot)
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot alternative using Ollama + VS-Code extension.

title: ollama-hub (technomancer-01/ollama-hub)
summary: Community-curated registry of Ollama models with one-line install commands.

title: ollama-rag (glangchain/ollama-rag)
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented-Generation stack using Ollama, Chroma, and LangChain.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring-Starter and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-csharp (awaescher/ollama-csharp)
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming and minimal dependencies.

title: ollama-discord (rizerphe/ollama-discord)
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into your server.

title: ollama-helm (thedatabaseme/ollama-helm)
summary: Officially listed Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-slack (gabotechs/ollama-slack)
summary: Slack bot that streams Ollama answers into threads with model selection.

title: ollama-dagger (grouville/dagger-ollama)
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-npm (npm package 'ollama')
summary: Official Ollama JS client distributed on npm; 20 kB, zero dependencies.

title: ollama-py (PyPI package 'ollama')
summary: Official Python client on PyPI; supports sync/async, embeddings, and tool calls.

title: ollama-rust (mdrokz/ollama-rust)
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio and serde.

title: ollama-zig (natecraddock/ollama-zig)
summary: Zig client for Ollama using std.http.

title: reddit/r/ollama
summary: Active subreddit for model sharing, troubleshooting, and ecosystem announcements.
